During the year presided over by Venus the earth will be rich
in rice and sugarcane, with its surface filled with water poured out
by mountain-like clouds, and bedecked with lakes whose waters are
filled with charming lotuses, and consequently will shine like a
damsel whose limbs are resplendent with lustrous ornaments. Kings
will make the quarters resound with the loud cries of victory,
having destroyed the mighty hosts of their enemies, and will rule
